mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment( member_id, order_id, payment_key, payment_method, amount, status, approved_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{orderId}, #{paymentKey}, #{paymentMethod}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{approvedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT v.bank_code, p.order_id, v.bank_account, v.account_holder_name, v.due_date, p.amount, p.status FROM payment p JOIN virtual_account v ON p.id = v.payment_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.status = #{status} AND v.due_date > NOW() ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT 3;
mapper.update: UPDATE payment p SET p.status = #{status}, p.approved_at = #{approvedAt} WHERE p.order_id = #{orderId} AND p.status = 'WAITING_FOR_DEPOSIT'
mapper.select: SELECT id AS paymentId, member_id AS memberId, amount FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId};
